response.justification: The candidate brings approximately 20 years of broad software engineering experience across a wide range of domains, satisfying the minimum experience threshold, and demonstrates recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq. However, the AI expertise is very recent (2025-present) and the role demands recognized, deep AI strategy leadership with demonstrated AI-powered products or platforms at scale. There is no advanced degree in an AI-related field, no clear evidence of advising strategic customers or partners, and the current seniority level (Staff Software Engineer) falls below the director-level IC profile the role targets.
strengths: ~20 years of polyglot engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, high-throughput data infrastructure, and cloud-native tooling
Active AI-agent and MCP (Model Context Protocol) infrastructure work at re:cinq, plus an ongoing open-source founder track record with GISCollective
Demonstrated knowledge-sharing and community leadership through workshops, conference talks, and open-source library authorship
concerns: AI expertise is concentrated in a single year (2025-present) with no prior record of building or shipping AI-powered products at scale, which is a core differentiator for the role
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field and no evidence of recognized external AI authority (publications, patents, prominent AI platform ownership)

Current and historical titles (Senior/Staff Software Developer) indicate an individual contributor track well below the director-level IC positioning and strategic customer advisory scope the role requires

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and track record
